name: herald-linkedin
description: HERALD LinkedIn publisher (Lambda). COMPLIANT posting via LinkedIn's OFFICIAL REST /rest/posts API on a 3-legged OAuth member token (w_member_social) - NO cookies, NO browser, NO ToS-gray automation. Kill-check first, re-verifies Vera on the exact final text, enforces SPEC-D caps (reserve-then-act), and posts ONLY when HERALD_LIVE=true (dry-run default). One agent = one service (SEC-3).
